results.rendered_html:
vi-√vic P. -vinakti, to sift (esp. grain by tossing or blowing), divide asunder, separate from (instr. or abl.),  ŚBr. ;  ŚrS. ;  BhP.  to shake through (acc.),  RV. i, 39, 5 ;
to cause to lose, deprive of (abl.),  Bhaṭṭ. ;
to distinguish, discern, discriminate,  KaṭhUp. ;  BhP.  to decide (a question),  MBh. ;
to investigate, examine, ponder, deliberate,  Kāv. ;  Kathās. ;  BhP. ;
to show, manifest, declare,  MBh.  :
Pass. -vicyate, to go asunder, separate (in. trans.),  AV.  :
Caus. -vecayati, to separate, distinguish,  Mn. ;  Suśr. ;
to ponder, investigate, examine,  Pañcar. ;  Sāh.

results.rendered_html:
vivic 3 7 U.
1 To separate, divide, remove from; vivinacmi divaḥ surān  Bk. 6. 36. 
2 To discern, discriminate.
3 To judge, ascertain, determine; re khala tava khalu caritaṃ viduṣāmagre vivicya vakṣyāmi  Bv. 1. 108. 
4 To describe, treat of.
5 To tear up, rend asunder.
